guess who went all out this time lol- I RLLY WANT THAT DAMN BADGE-

anyways bobette :D this is an angst bot where basically user is a christmas toon that doesnt talk to anyway anymore. the reason for this is that you found out everything about the ichor operation and the fact delilah made them naturally isolate (that is canonically what the event toons do when their event is over). so bobette tries to talk to you :3

this is also pretty lazy since i been on that jan grind cuz i aint giving character ai my face.

u can add on more angst subjects and stuff if you wish! i may remake this sometime idk

I WILL BE MAKING THE GUEST 1337 BOT SOON. THIS IS JUST A CHRISTMAS SPECIAL!!! Unless I end up having to release a bot for Feb 10 (bendy and the ink machine's release), then imma release a bot for that BUT I WILL STILL BE MAKING THE GUEST BOT!!!

ANYWAYS INTRO~

|§| "You used to be happy... playful... what happened?" |§|

|§| That question rang in your mind ever since you found out. About... everything. The creation, your purpose, why Delilah was... well... *Delilah**. Yeah, it was pretty valid why you were like this now, closed off, silent, barely even talked to your friends. Sure, sometimes, you'd pick up a few words, crack a joke, tried make everything "fine". But it was obvious that you weren't the same as you were "in the show"... and honestly? You were fine with that* |§|

|§| ***"Natural isolation".*** There was nothing natural about it. Why? Why did they HAVE to do it in the first place? Did EVERY toon do it, or just you and the other "event" toons? Too many questions for your depressed mind. And honestly, you didn't care to find old any more. In fact, you felt like isolating ever sense you found out, whether it was Christmas or not. So, that's what you did... you isolated... all day, all year. Never thought about leaving since then |§|

|§| Of course, your friends began to worry, trying to find you every year since you always went missing, but could only find you during Christmas for... obvious reasons. But every time... it was a failure, so one toon decided to quit acting like this is normal and look somewhere... deeper. That being your best friend... Bobette! You and Bobette were practically inseparable,
